message:

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-policy-agent-opa-3448-docs-consider-adding-validation-of-checksums-or-signa",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-policy-agent-opa-: Docs: Consider adding validation of checksums or signatures to OPA install documentation",
+    "description": "Docs: Consider adding validation of checksums or signatures to OPA install documentation. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nhelm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-\n```\nCurrently the OPA [installation documentation](https://www.openpolicyagent.org/docs/latest/#running-opa) involves downloading and execution a binary program\n\nAt the moment, there's not mention in the documentation of how to validate a digital"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Docs: Consider adding validation of checksums or signatures…",
+        "description": "Adds sha256 checksum to all binaries\n\nThese checksums can be used to verify file integrity.\n```yaml\nValidate the binary (optional)\n\nDownload the kubectl checksum file:\n\ncurl -LO \"https://dl.k8s.io/$(curl -L -s https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl.sha256\"\nValidate the kubectl binary against the checksum file:\n\necho \"$(<kubectl.sha256) kubectl\" | sha256sum --check\nIf valid, the output is:\n\nkubectl: OK\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Docs: Consider adding validation of checksums or signatures…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds sha256 checksum to all binaries\n\nThese checksums can be used to verify file integrity.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Validate the binary (optional)\n\nDownload the kubectl checksum file:\n\ncurl -LO \"https://dl.k8s.io/$(curl -L -s https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl.sha256\"\nValidate the kubectl binary against the checksum file:\n\necho \"$(<kubectl.sha256) kubectl\" | sha256sum --check\nIf valid, the output is:\n\nkubectl: OK"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "open-policy-agent-opa-",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [

+    ],

+    },

+  },
